overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character in a red and gold embroidered robe walking through a snowy, mountainous wilderness. The character traverses rocky terrain, passes a wooden hamlet with a lit lamp post, and descends into a misty valley filled with dead trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain trail with large rock outcroppings

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a snowy dirt path through rocky terrain with pine trees visible on the left

entered.detail: massive gray boulders lining the right side of the trail
snow-dusted evergreen trees scattered on the hillside
snow-covered dirt trail winding through the rocky landscape

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a snowy mountain trail flanked by large rock formations on the right and sparse pine trees on the left. The overcast sky creates a cool, diffused light over the desolate winter landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain trail approaching wooden hamlet with lit lamp post

events.description: passing a lit black lamp post on the right side of the path
character turns left away from the wooden structure toward open terrain

agents.ego_description: walking past a lit lamp post and wooden hamlet building, then turning left onto a wider path

entered.detail: black metal lamp post with glowing yellow light
rustic wooden building with snow-covered roof and covered porch

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and passes a lit lamp post and a rustic wooden hamlet building. After passing the structure, the character turns left onto an open path, leaving the rocks behind as the pine trees recede into the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland with distant mountain views

events.description: terrain opens up to reveal distant mountains and wider landscape views

agents.ego_description: walking across open snowy grassland with scattered rocks and distant mountains visible ahead

entered.detail: expansive field covered in snow and tall grass
large layered mountain visible in the hazy background
isolated boulders scattered across the grassy terrain

segments.scene_description: Moving away from the wooden structure, the character enters an expansive open grassland with scattered rocks. The landscape opens up to reveal distant layered mountains under the overcast sky, with the path leading toward a valley filled with dead trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow valley with dense dead trees and tall grass

events.description: entering a narrow valley with dense dead trees and overgrown grass on both sides

agents.ego_description: walking down into a narrow valley surrounded by dense dead trees and tall grassy banks

entered.detail: dense cluster of leafless gnarled trees lining the path
tall snow-dusted grass forming steep banks along the trail
winding dirt trail descending between the grassy banks

segments.scene_description: The character descends into a narrow, enclosed valley where the sky becomes mostly obscured by dense dead trees. The path winds between steep banks of tall grass, creating a more confined and atmospheric environment as the character continues deeper into the wilderness.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a desolate snowy mountain trail that gradually descends into a confined, atmospheric valley of dead trees. It begins with the character walking along a rocky path flanked by sparse pine trees under a cool, diffused overcast sky. As the character passes a lit lamp post and a rustic wooden hamlet, the camera turns left, leaving the rock formations behind as the pine trees recede. The scene then expands into an open grassland with scattered rocks, revealing distant layered mountains before the path leads toward a descending valley. Finally, the environment shifts from the open highlands into a narrow, enclosed space where the sky is obscured by dense dead trees and steep banks of tall grass.
